description: baseline (SwiGLU d12 ClimbMix) — BROKEN cooldown: loss 1.50→5.15 during warmdown
constant WD (remove decay) + WARMDOWN_RATIO 0.4→0.3 — warmdown still broken
WARMDOWN_RATIO 0.4→0.0 (no warmdown): loss STILL explodes ~step160 (1.5→5.0) proving instability is NOT warmdown-related but model/optimizer bug
grad clip max_norm=1.0 + WARMDOWN_RATIO=0.4: loss spike reduced (5.0→3.1) but NOT eliminated, clip alone insufficient — need to fix root cause (Q/K weight growth per Moonshot paper)

Bottleneck: MFU 24% (32 grad accum). Hypothesis: smaller batch (2^18→2^16) = more optimizer steps + better MFU. Evidence: nanochat uses large batch but we have only 180 steps. Result: val_bpb 2.14→1.83 (big win), loss still explodes at ~42M tokens proving data issue not optimizer. MFU unchanged (23→22.6%) so bottleneck is NOT grad accum.
